summary: Fleet Planning Module Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 API tests passed - GET /api/fleet/planning (day/week views), POST /api/fleet/planning/check-conflict (conflict detection). Frontend: All UI tests passed - Planning page loads with day view default, 2 drivers displayed (Vova YERITSYAN, Mariam saroyan) with status indicators, timeline 06:00-22:00, SOCIETE event block at 14:00-15:30 for Mariam, Jour/Semaine toggle, navigation arrows, filter panel with driver/source filters and legend, hover tooltip. Regression: Mes Reservations and Reservations Zont pages working.

issues: React hydration warnings in console from Emergent preview wrapper injecting <span> into <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.test_conflict_check_different_driver: PASS - Different driver has no conflict

frontend_tests.societe_event_block: PASS - Blue SOCIETE event at 14:00-15:30 for Mariam

verified_features: Fleet Login: Authentication with Nandetiri1@gmail.com/12345678
Navigation: 'Planning' menu item added to sidebar
Planning Page: /fleet/planning loads with day view by default
Day View: Horizontal timeline from 06:00 to 22:00
Driver Rows: Shows driver name, initials avatar, status (Disponible/Occupe/Hors ligne)
Events: Blue blocks for SOCIETE bookings, green for Zont auctions
Event Block: Shows time, source label, pickup/dropoff addresses
Week View: 7-day grid with day names (Lun-Dim), today highlighted
Aujourd'hui Button: Returns to current date
Jour/Semaine Toggle: Switches between day and week views
Navigation Arrows: Previous/Next day or week
Filter Panel: Toggle shows driver filter, source filter, legend
Driver Filter: Dropdown to filter by specific driver
Source Filter: Filter by Zont or Societe bookings
Legend: Color coding for Zont/Societe and status indicators
Hover Tooltip: Fixed bottom-right tooltip shows full event details
Backend GET /api/fleet/planning: Returns drivers with events from Zont API + MongoDB
Backend GET /api/fleet/planning?view=week: Returns 7-day date range
Backend POST /api/fleet/planning/check-conflict: Detects overlapping bookings
Conflict Detection: Checks both Zont and company bookings for driver
REGRESSION: Mes Reservations page still working
REGRESSION: Reservations Zont page still working
critical_code_review_comments: FleetPlanning.js correctly implements timeline with horizontal scrolling day view
Backend fleet_planning.py correctly aggregates C# API (Zont) + MongoDB (company) data
Conflict check correctly detects overlapping time ranges for same driver
Driver status (available/busy/offline) correctly determined from events and activation
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Event tooltip shows complete booking information on hover
Week view correctly calculates Monday-Sunday range
context_for_next_testing_agent: Planning module fully tested. Day view shows timeline 06:00-22:00. Week view shows 7 days. Events come from two sources: Zont (C# API via proxy) and company (MongoDB fleet_reservations). Conflict check endpoint validates driver availability. Use Mariam saroyan (driverId: 858e3dc3-5bb4-431d-b108-4c620375551c) for testing as she has an existing company booking at 14:00-15:30 on 2026-03-19.

mocked_api.note: Planning uses C# API proxy for Zont data + MongoDB for company bookings. No mocking.
